overview.description: The WisdomTree Private Credit and Alternative Income Fund (HYIN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of 35 alternative credit vehicles and private credit investments. The selection is based on related exposure to alternative credit and trading requirements HYIN was launched on May 6, 2021 and is issued by WisdomTree.
